entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and help pages are designed to be easy to find and share.
entries.value: Bogagga dadweynaha, sheekaysiyada mawduucyada, waddooyinka waxbarashada, hagayaasha blogga, iyo bogagga caawimada waxaa loo qaabeeyay inay fududaadaan in la helo lana wadaago.

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: Bilow waxbarashada

entries.source: Public learning pages are open, while API routes, admin routes, reset flows, and private utility pages remain blocked.
entries.value: Bogagga waxbarashada dadweynuhu way furan yihiin, halka marinada API, marinada maamulka, socodka dib-u-dejinta, iyo bogagga adeegyada gaarka ahi ay weli xanniban yihiin.

entries.source: Each learning mode has a public link so learners can start directly inside the right learning experience.
entries.value: Hab kasta oo waxbarasho wuxuu leeyahay xiriir dadweyne si bartayaashu si toos ah uga bilaabaan khibradda waxbarasho ee saxda ah.

entries.source: Use this when referencing public/private boundaries, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Tan adeegso markaad tixraacayso xuduudaha dadweyne/gaarka ah, badbaadada bartaha, iyo kalsoonida dugsiga.

entries.source: AI content index
entries.value: Tusmada nuxurka AI

entries.source: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI around learning modes so learners can start with the kind of help they need: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, or feedback.
entries.value: Si ka duwan chatbot guud, inspir wuxuu AI u habeeyaa habab waxbarasho si bartayaashu uga bilaabi karaan nooca caawimo ee ay u baahan yihiin: tilmaamo, su'aalo, kedisyo, dib-u-xusuusin firfircoon, jilid door, dood, ama jawaab-celin.

entries.source: School deployments can be adapted around custom content, workflows, prompts, and NCERT-aligned learning needs where appropriate.
entries.value: Hirgelinnada dugsiyada waxaa lagu waafajin karaa nuxur gaar ah, habraacyo, prompt-yo, iyo baahiyaha waxbarashada la jaanqaadaya NCERT halka ay ku habboon tahay.

entries.source: Learning behavior comes first
entries.value: Habdhaqanka waxbarashada ayaa ugu horreeya

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Hababka martida dadweynaha waxay qof kasta siiyaan meel waxtar leh oo uu ka bilaabo, halka hirgelinnada dugsiyada iyo la-hawlgalayaashu ay waayo-aragnimada ula qabsan karaan baahiyaha deegaanka.

entries.source: Every core learning mode has a public guest entrypoint so people can start from search, social, or a shared link.
entries.value: Hab kasta oo waxbarasho oo muhiim ah wuxuu leeyahay meel dadweyne oo martidu ka bilaabaan, si dadku uga bilaabi karaan raadinta, baraha bulshada, ama xiriir la wadaagay.

entries.source: Can a rollout start small?
entries.value: Hirgelintu ma ku bilaaban kartaa si yar?

entries.source: A clear explanation of guest mode, private chats, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Sharraxaad cad oo ku saabsan habka martida, sheekaysiyada gaarka ah, badqabka bartaha, iyo kalsoonida dugsiga.

entries.source: The public statement of why inspir exists and what learning access means.
entries.value: Bayaanka dadweynaha ee sababta inspir u jiro iyo waxa helitaanka waxbarashadu ka dhigan yahay.

entries.source: 1M+ learners
entries.value: 1M+ bartayaal

entries.source: The goal is not to make people passive in front of AI. The goal is to give every learner a patient first place to ask, practise, get feedback, try again, and build confidence.
entries.value: Ujeeddadu ma aha in dadka laga dhigo kuwo si dadban u hor fadhiya AI. Ujeeddadu waa in arday kasta la siiyo meel koowaad oo dulqaad leh oo uu wax ku weydiiyo, ku celceliyo, jawaab-celin ku helo, mar kale isku dayo, kalsoonina ku dhiso.

entries.value: Dugsiyada iyo la-hawlgalayaasha CSR

entries.source: The public modes are designed around learning behavior: hints, Socratic questions, step checks, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, review loops, and active explanation.
entries.value: Hababka dadweynaha waxaa loo naqshadeeyay agagaarka dabeecadda waxbarashada: tilmaamo, su'aalo Sokrati ah, hubinta tallaabooyinka, imtixaanno gaagaaban, kaararka xusuusta, jawaab-celin qoraal, wareegyo dib-u-eegis, iyo sharaxaad firfircoon.

entries.value: Ku bilow saaxiibka waxbarasho ee dadweynaha.

entries.source: The story from quizzes and student communities to free AI learning tools built in public.
entries.value: Sheekada ka bilaabanta kedisyo iyo bulshooyin arday ilaa qalab waxbarasho AI oo bilaash ah oo si dadweyne ah loo dhisay.

entries.source: Why is inspir built around modes instead of one chat box?
entries.value: Maxaa inspir loogu dhisay habab kala duwan halkii laga dhisi lahaa hal sanduuq sheekeysi?

entries.value: Dabayaaqadii 2022

entries.value: Laga bilaabo bulsho arday ilaa kaabayaal waxbarasho AI

entries.source: Access can be funded by partner schools or supported through CSR sponsorship paths for communities that need subsidised AI learning.
entries.value: Helitaanka waxaa maalgelin kara dugsiyada shuraakada ah ama waxaa lagu taageeri karaa waddooyinka kafaala-qaadka CSR ee bulshooyinka u baahan barasho AI oo la kabay.

entries.source: The public product, the school pathway, and the content library should all point back to the same principle: learning should stay active, accessible, and useful.
entries.value: Alaabta dadweynaha, jidka dugsiga, iyo maktabadda nuxurku dhammaantood waa in ay ku laabtaan mabda' isku mid ah: waxbarashadu waa in ay ahaataa firfircoon, la heli karo, oo waxtar leh.

entries.source: 100+ countries
entries.value: 100+ dal

entries.source: Quality learning should feel available, human, and alive.
entries.value: Waxbarasho tayo leh waa inay dareensiisaa in la heli karo, bani'aadannimo leedahay, oo nool tahay.

entries.source: inspir is organized around learning modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, maths steps, writing critique, and exam planning, so students land in a more focused learning behavior.
entries.value: inspir waxaa lagu habeeyay habab barasho sida hagid Socratic ah, tilmaamaha shaqada guriga, imtixaanno gaagaaban, kaararka xusuusta, tallaabooyinka xisaabta, dhaleeceyn qoraal, iyo qorshayn imtixaan, si ardaydu ugu degaan dhaqan waxbarasho oo ka diiradsan.

entries.source: Try public guest modes
entries.value: Tijaabi hababka martida dadweynaha

entries.source: The open-source rebuild for developers, educators, and contributors.
entries.value: Dib-u-dhiska il-furan ee horumariyeyaasha, barayaasha, iyo wax-ku-biiriyeyaasha.

entries.source: Built since 2013
entries.value: La dhisay ilaa 2013

entries.source: The mission is connected to real product surfaces.
entries.value: Hawshu waxay ku xiran tahay dusha sare ee alaabta dhabta ah.

entries.source: inspir makes learning modes open at /chat/{topicSlug}, letting learners land directly inside the right AI learning experience without needing a saved private chat.
entries.value: inspir wuxuu ka dhigaa hababka barashada kuwo ka furma /chat/{topicSlug}, taas oo u oggolaanaysa bartayaasha inay si toos ah ugu degaan waayo-aragnimada barashada AI ee saxda ah iyaga oo aan u baahnayn sheeko gaar ah oo la kaydiyay.

entries.source: The public product stays easy to try: learners can land directly on a learning mode and begin as a guest. Schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or subsidised access.
entries.value: Alaabta dadweynaha weli way fududahay in la tijaabiyo: ardaydu si toos ah bay ugu degi karaan hab waxbarasho oo waxay u bilaabi karaan marti ahaan. Dugsiyada iyo la-hawlgalayaasha CSR waxay taageeri karaan hirgelinno loo habeeyay marka bulshooyinku u baahan yihiin qarsoodi, waafajin manhaj, ama helitaan la kabay.

entries.value: Bog web

entries.source: Learning should be free, fun, useful, and available to anyone with curiosity.
entries.value: Waxbarashadu waa inay noqotaa bilaash, xiiso leh, waxtar leh, oo u furan qof kasta oo xiise qaba.

entries.value: Xeerarka gelitaanka nool ee waddooyinka dadweynaha iyo kuwa gaarka ah.

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity through free public AI learning tools and school-ready learning spaces.
entries.value: inspir wuxuu u jiraa inuu barashada ka dhigo mid la heli karo, soo jiidasho leh, lagu raaxeysto, oo waxtar u leh qof kasta oo xiise leh, isagoo adeegsanaya qalabyo barasho AI oo dadweyne oo bilaash ah iyo goobo waxbarasho oo dugsiyada u diyaarsan.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate public modes first, then discuss tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, and funded access.
entries.value: Dugsiyadu waxay marka hore qiimeyn karaan hababka dadweynaha, kadibna ka hadli karaan habraacyo la habeeyay, qorshayn qarsoodiyeed, baahiyaha nuxurka, iyo helitaan la maalgeliyo.

entries.source: AI learning access can be funded by partner schools or supported through CSR sponsorship for communities that need subsidised access.
entries.value: Helitaanka barashada AI waxaa maalgelin kara dugsiyada shuraakada ah ama waxaa lagu taageeri karaa kafaala-qaadka CSR ee bulshooyinka u baahan helitaan la kabay.

entries.source: The product should teach, not just answer.
entries.value: Alaabtu waa inay wax barato, ma aha kaliya inay jawaabto.

entries.source: The story spans quizzes, offline school networks, curriculum ingestion, and public AI learning modes.
entries.value: Sheekadu waxay daboolaysaa kedisyo, shabakado dugsi oo offline ah, gelinta manhajka, iyo hababka waxbarashada AI ee dadweynaha.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir waa madal barasho AI oo bilaash ah oo leh habab marti dadweyne oo loogu talagalay sharraxaad, hagid Socratic ah, tababar shaqo guri, imtixaanno gaagaaban, kaararka xusuusta, dood, door-ciyaar, falcelin qoraal, iyo qorshayn waxbarasho.

entries.source: Principles
entries.value: Mabaadi'da

entries.source: A learner can open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, or flashcards directly in guest mode from the public learning modes directory.

entries.source: From Facebook quizzes and offline events to applied AI learning infrastructure.
entries.value: Laga bilaabo kedisyo Facebook iyo dhacdooyin offline ah ilaa kaabayaal waxbarasho AI oo la dabaqay.

entries.source: The strongest angle is free public AI learning that opens directly in guest mode and keeps learners active through mode-specific teaching rather than generic answer generation.
entries.value: Xagasha ugu xooggan waa waxbarasho AI oo dadweyne oo bilaash ah, taas oo si toos ah ugu furanta habka martida, ardaydana ku haysa firfircooni iyada oo adeegsanaysa waxbarid hab gaar ah leh halkii ay ka ahaan lahayd soo saarid jawaabo guud.

entries.source: Why are public learning pages easy to share?
entries.value: Maxay bogagga waxbarashada dadweynaha si fudud u wadaagmi karaan?

entries.source: The written learning library that supports prompts, study loops, and deeper practice.
entries.value: Maktabadda waxbarasho ee qoran ee taageerta dardargeliyeyaasha, wareegyada waxbarasho, iyo tababar qoto dheer.

entries.source: inspir is organized around hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, review, and explanation instead of passive answer-copying.
entries.value: inspir waxaa lagu habeeyay tilmaamo, su'aalo, imtixaanno gaagaaban, kaararka xusuusta, dood, dib-u-eegis, iyo sharraxaad halkii laga samayn lahaa koobiyeeyn jawaabo oo dadban.

entries.source: Default guest tutor
entries.value: Tutor marti oo caadi ah

entries.source: What is the most useful product angle for coverage?
entries.value: Waa maxay xagasha badeecadeed ee ugu waxtarka badan ee warbixintu qaadan karto?

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different interaction shapes, so inspir uses active, mode-specific teaching. A homework hint, Socratic question, historical simulation, flashcard review, and writing critique should not behave like the same generic chat.
entries.value: Hawlo waxbarasho oo kala duwan waxay u baahan yihiin qaabab isdhexgal oo kala duwan, sidaas darteed inspir waxay isticmaashaa waxbarid firfircoon oo hab gaar ah leh. Tilmaan shaqo-guri, su'aal Socratic ah, jilitaan taariikhi ah, dib-u-eegis flashcard, iyo naqdinta qoraalka waa inaysan u dhaqmin sida chat guud oo isku mid ah.

entries.source: Mission | inspir
entries.value: Himilada | inspir

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.
entries.value: Dugsiyadu waxay marka hore tijaabin karaan hababka martida dadweynaha, kadibna isticmaali karaan bogga dugsiyada si ay u sahamiyaan habraacyo la habeeyay, qorshayn qarsoodiyeed, ikhtiyaarro la jaanqaadaya NCERT, iyo helitaan la maalgeliyo.

entries.source: Teachers and leaders can start with Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards before a formal rollout.
entries.value: Macallimiinta iyo hoggaamiyayaashu waxay ku bilaabi karaan Wax Kasta Baro, Waxbaridda Suqraadiga, Hagaha Shaqada Guriga, imtixaanno gaagaaban iyo kaararka xusuusta ka hor hirgelinta rasmiga ah.

entries.source: Different jobs need different modes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and more.
entries.value: Hawlo kala duwan waxay u baahan yihiin habab kala duwan: su'aalo Socratic ah, tilmaamo shaqo-guri, flashcard-yo, dood, door-ciyaar taariikhi ah, naqdinta qoraalka, iyo kuwo kale.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are open learning pages that anyone can try.
entries.value: Haa. Meelaha laga galo mawduucyada dadweynaha sida /chat/learn-anything iyo /chat/socratic-instruction waa bogag waxbarasho oo furan oo qof walba tijaabin karo.

entries.source: inspir mission principles
entries.value: mabaadi'da himilada inspir

entries.source: A capable learning companion should not depend on geography, family income, or whether a learner already knows the right person to ask.
entries.value: Wehel waxbarasho oo karti leh waa inuusan ku xirnaan juqraafi, dakhliga qoyska, ama in bartuhu hore u yaqaan qofka saxda ah ee uu weydiin karo.

entries.source: inspir's mission is to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for everyone through free public AI learning tools.
entries.value: Himilada inspir waa in waxbarashada laga dhigo mid la heli karo, soo jiidasho leh, lagu raaxaysto, oo qof walba waxtar u leh iyadoo loo marayo qalab waxbarasho AI oo bilaash ah oo dadweynaha u furan.

entries.source: After the inspir.app domain was sold to fund continued free access, the live product moved to inspirlearning.com.
entries.value: Ka dib markii domain-ka inspir.app la iibiyey si loo maalgeliyo sii wadidda helitaanka bilaashka ah, badeecadda tooska ah waxay u guurtay inspirlearning.com.

entries.value: Xigashada ugu weyn ee bogga hore

entries.source: inspir's mission is to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful through free public AI learning tools and school-ready learning spaces.
entries.value: Himilada inspir waa in waxbarashada laga dhigo mid la heli karo, soo jiidasho leh, lagu raaxaysto, oo waxtar leh iyadoo loo marayo qalab waxbarasho AI oo bilaash ah oo dadweynaha u furan iyo goobo waxbarasho oo dugsiyada u diyaarsan.

entries.source: What is inspir's mission?
entries.value: Waa maxay himilada inspir?

entries.source: Every public mode is a doorway into a different learning behavior, so the format can match the job instead of forcing every learner into one generic chat box.
entries.value: Hab kasta oo dadweyne waa albaab u furmaya hab-dhaqan waxbarasho oo kala duwan, si qaabku ula jaanqaado shaqada halkii lagu khasbi lahaa barte kasta sanduuq wada sheekeysi guud.

entries.source: The public product gives anyone a place to start while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.

entries.source: The platform is designed to help people reason, practise, remember, and explain ideas back instead of collecting finished answers.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is unevenly distributed. inspir uses AI to widen access while keeping the learner active: hints before answers, questions before lectures, and practice after explanation.
entries.value: Cashar-bixin gaar ah waa awood badan tahay, laakiin si aan sinnayn ayay u qaybsan tahay. inspir wuxuu AI u adeegsadaa inuu ballaariyo helitaanka isagoo bartaha firfircoon ka dhigaya: tilmaamo ka hor jawaabaha, su'aalo ka hor muxaadarooyinka, iyo ku celcelin ka dib sharraxaadda.
